questions.q: Who commanded the Continental Army during the Revolution?
questions.explanation: Washington's leadership made him the 'Father of Our Country.'

questions.q: Which American victory convinced France to enter the war as an ally?
questions.explanation: The 1777 victory at Saratoga brought decisive French support.

questions.q: The major fighting effectively ended with the British surrender at which battle?
questions.explanation: American and French forces trapped the British at Yorktown in 1781.

questions.q: What did the 1783 Treaty of Paris accomplish?
options: Recognized the independence of the United States
questions.explanation: The treaty formally ended the war and recognized U.S. independence.

questions.q: What was Washington's basic war strategy?
options: Keep the Continental Army alive until Britain tired of the war
questions.explanation: He did not need to win every battle — only to outlast Britain.
